description_long: This filing cabinet features a modern, minimalist design with a wood-textured exterior and a contrasting dark gray drawer front. The cabinet has a single, wide drawer equipped with a sleek metallic bar handle, and an open shelf space beneath the drawer for additional storage. The side panels are slightly curved at the top, adding a subtle design element to the otherwise rectangular form. The top surface is flat and can be used to support small objects or documents. The materials appear to be a combination of laminated wood or engineered wood for the main structure and a metal or plastic handle. The overall build suggests it is sturdy and suitable for frequent use in an urban environment.
description: A modern wood-textured filing cabinet with a single wide gray drawer, metallic handle, and an open lower shelf. The design is minimalist with curved side panels and a flat top surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wood-textured panel with a slight curve at the top and no visible drawer or handle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the wide gray drawer with a metallic bar handle and an open shelf below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first side with the same wood texture and curved top edge.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panel and the open shelf space, with no visible handle or drawer front.
